title: Jimmy posts yield followers or leads (binary)
description: Ensure every Jimmy post increases followers or generates leads; enforce a binary outcome, no random generic XYZ comments.
full_idea: Remember that I need to update Jimmy so that every post he makes either gains me followers or gets me leads. Make it a binary. I don’t want any random generic comment XYZ.
